product.name: Glitzhome 28" H Fabric Gnome Christmas Decorations with Dangling Legs & Knitted Hat, Plush Gnome Elf Ornaments for Tabletop Party Holiday Decor
features: 【LUXURIOUS HANDMADE MATERIAL】Crafted from 100% polyester, our Christmas gnome is irresistibly soft to the touch and completely safe for kids. Carefully handmade with premium faux fur and a delicately knitted hat for that perfect cozy holiday feel. Spot clean only for easy maintenance.

【PERFECT FESTIVE SIZE】Measuring 8" L x 5.25" W x 28.5" H, this gnome is the ideal decorative companion—whether sitting cheerfully on your mantel, bookshelf, end table, or windowsill. Its charming sitting pose with dangling legs brings a playful holiday spirit to any corner of your home.

【HEARTWARMING DESIGN】With a fluffy white beard, a sweet little nose, and bright friendly eyes, this elf gnome is sure to spark joy and bring back magical childhood memories. Its classic Scandinavian-style look blends tradition with whimsy, making it an instant conversation starter.

【VERSATILE HOLIDAY DECOR】This plush gnome isn’t just a decoration—it’s a piece of holiday magic. Perfect for tabletops, staircases, entryways, or even as a festive tree companion. Let it spread cheer throughout your living room, dining area, office, or kitchen during Christmas and beyond.

【PERFECT GIFT IDEA】Looking for a unique and meaningful gift? This Santa gnome is an enchanting present for family, friends, and kids. Symbolizing good luck and Guardianshipin Nordic traditions, it’s more than a decoration—it’s a token of love and warm wishes for the holiday season.
